titleStmt.title: SII 25.283: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 283. (A.R. No. 283 of 1908.) AḶAGĀDRIPUTTŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in Svarṇapurīśvara temple.
In the absence of the regular praśasti of the king, the record may be assigned to Rājarāja I on the basis of his title ‘Rājarājakēsarivarman’, with which the record commences.
The record furnishes the details of date viz., regnal year 7, Kaṟkaṭaka, Monday, saptami, Sōdi (Svāti)-nakshatra corresponding to 991 A.D., July 20, f.d.n. ·05.

It records an iṟai-kāval-oṭṭōlai issued by the peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ which met at the Pērambalam of the above village to the temple of Tirupputtūruḍaiya-Paramasvāmi of Pāradāyakuḍi, a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūrnāḍu.

It refers to the construction of the śrīvimāna to the deity Paramasvāmi and registers the grant of mā-kāṇi of maḍakku lands below the channel called Āyirattu-muṉṉūṟṟuva-vākkāl, made after purchase for a price-value of sixty kaḻañju of tuḷaippoṉ, by Pullālich-chāttaṉ Kārivēḷar Gaṇḍarādittaṉ alias Mummaḍiśōḻiyavaraiyar to provide for the food-offerings and perpetual lamp to the deity Paramasvāmi. It is stated that the dēvarkaṉmigaḷ undertook to collect the various taxes such as vāśalil pōnda-kuḍimai, ūriḍuvarippāḍumiṟai, ēchchōṟu, seṉṉīrveṭṭi, etc., on these lands. These iṟaikāval-oṭṭōlai was drafted by madhyasthan Mādāṉamaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ Pusa •• gaṉ Gōvindaṉ alias Irunūṟṟuva Alaṅkārapriyaṉ.

Besdies a stand lamp (nilai-viḷakku) of five span length instituted by Vēḷaṉ Gaṇḍarā[di*]ch-chaṉ alias Mummuḍichōḷa-Śōḻiyavaraiyar, he is referred to have endowed a śēkaṇḍi (spouted vessel) of 110 niṟai and a bell (mūvaṇaik-kaimmaṇi) of 187 niṟai, amounting to 297 niṟai.

The surnames Gaṇḍarādittaṉ and Mummaḍiśōḻiyavaraiyar must have been assumed by Kārivēḷar after king Gaṇḍarāditya, father of Uttama-chōḷa and Rājarāja I respectively. Pāradāyakkuḍi was perhaps a brāhmaṇa quarter of Tirupputtūr, the same as the modern Aḷagādri-puttūr where the village assembly existed and met.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirāja rājakesari panmaṟkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam pāratāya kuṭiperuṅ kuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivvāṭṭai kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum saptamiyum peṟṟa cotiñāyaṟṟu pakal Eṅkaḷūr perampalatte kuṟicāṟṟi peruṅkuṟi kaṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu paṇip paṇiyāṟ paṇittu Eṅkaḷūr tirupputtūruṭaiya para[ masvāmi] kku Oṭṭi Iṟai kāval Oṭṭolai Iṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu Ipparamasvāmikku śrīvimāṉaṅ kallāl leḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭai
rai kiḻakkūr nāṭṭu pullāliccāttaṉ kāriveḷār kaṇṭarātittaṉṉāṉa mummaṭi coḻiyavaraiyar Ipparamasvāmikku tiruvamirtukkum kaṟiyamutukkum neyyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum tirunontā viḷakkukkummāka koṇṭu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟuva vākkālukku teṟkku tiruvaraṅka coḻaṉ nilam palataṭiyāy taṉ tarattiṉ (ki) maṭakku vanta nilam kālinkiḻ mākāṇi Iṉṉilam kāliṉkiḻ mākāṇi nilattukkum candraādittaval Iṟaikāvallāka Imum
kuṟipperumakkaḷom koṇṭa poṉkaḻai muntiri pokat tuḷaippoṉ Aṟupatiṉ kaḻaiñcu Ippoṉ Aṟupatiṉ kaḻaiñcum kaiccellak koṇṭu Im muṉ cuṭṭappaṭṭa palataṭiyāy taṉ tarattu maṭakki vantanilam Ikkāliṉ kiḻ mākāṇi nilattukkum vācalil ponta kuṭimaiyum Ūriṭu varippāṭum Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum ceṉṉirveṭṭiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum candrādittaval Iṟai Iṟuttuk kuṭuppomākavum It kuṟi Iruntu I
ṟai kāṭṭil Idevar kanmikaḷe tāṅkaḷ veṇṭuṅ kaḷattu tāṅkaḷ veṇṭum poṉ maṉṟiṉāl maṉṟiyum Ivvāṭṭu poṉmaṉṟa Iṟaiye Iṟuttu Iṉṉilattukku k kuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum paṇitta brāhmaṇaraiyum paṇikeṭṭa karaṇattāṉaiyum Iṟaikāṭṭiṉa karaṇattāṉaiyum Idevar kanmikaḷey poṉ Aimpatu Aimpatu poṉ maṉṟi Iṟuppittālum Iṉnilam kāliṉkīḻ mākāṇi nilattukkum candrādittaval I mākavu
m Ivvoṭṭolaippaṭiyey kallil veṭṭavum śāsaṉam ceyvittukoḷḷavum peruvārāka Oṭṭi Iṟai kāval voṭṭolai Iṭṭu kuṭuttom Eṅkaḷūr tirupputtūruṭaiya paramasvāmikku pāratāyakkuṭi peṟuṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom paṇiyāl Ivviṟai kāval Oṭṭolai Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr maddhyasdhan mātāṉa maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ puca kaṉ kovintaṉṉāṉa Irunūṟṟuva Alaṅkāra priya neṉ
śrīveḷāṉ kaṇṭarāticcaṉnāna mummuṭicoḻac coḻiyavaraiyar Iṭṭanilai viḷakku Aiñcāṇ niḷattoṭu Āiravanāl niṟai Irunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟu Eḻu Ivare Iṭṭa cekaṇṭi niṟai nūṟṟoruvatu Āiravanāl Iṭṭa kaimmaṇi Āyiravanāl muvaṇaikkaim maṇiyāy niṟai nūṟṟeṇpatteḻu .
Digital edition of SII 25.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
